description: Automated incident response for GuardDuty HIGH or CRITICAL findings. Captures forensic metadata, isolates the affected resource, and escalates to the security team.

steps.name: notify_security_team_pagerduty
steps.description: Create P1 PagerDuty incident for the security team immediately.

params.message: CRITICAL: GuardDuty HIGH/CRITICAL finding detected. Automated forensic response initiated. Security team review required immediately.

steps.name: notify_slack_security_channel
steps.description: Post finding details to #security-incidents Slack channel.

params.message: GuardDuty HIGH/CRITICAL finding detected. Runbook executing: forensic capture in progress. Check AWS Console → GuardDuty → Findings for details. Follow containment steps in runbook.

steps.name: capture_cloudtrail_logs
steps.description: Capture recent CloudTrail events for the affected resource.

containment_steps: 1. Open GuardDuty console and note: finding type, affected resource ARN, and IP address
2. If finding type is 'UnauthorizedAccess': immediately revoke IAM credentials for affected principal
3. If EC2 instance: isolate by placing in a 'quarantine' security group (deny all traffic)
4. If Lambda function: set reserved concurrency to 0 (disable execution)
5. Enable CloudTrail data events for the affected resource if not already enabled
6. Export GuardDuty finding to S3 for forensic preservation
hipaa_notes: If finding involves potential PHI access: immediately notify Privacy Officer per HIPAA Breach Notification Rule (45 CFR §164.410). Document timeline with < 60-day notification deadline.
